description: Keep Your Baby Snug And Warm With Our Baby Bath Gown, This beautifully embroidered baby bath gown is made from 100% terry polyester fabric, which makes it absorbent and soft against the skin. The gown is intricately designed to keep your little one warm when they step out of the bath. Made with 100% polyester, the bath gown has a shawl collar to keep baby cozy and towelling binding on the cuffs and hem to absorb water after bath time. The gown ties at the back for an adjustable fit and is easy to put on and take off. The robe has an easy to use belt at the waist. This comes personalised with a name appliqued in the matching baby blue thread. It makes a lovely gift for newborns and makes the perfect baby shower gift! ? A Cute And Cuddly Little Bath Robe, Super Warm To Snuggle In After Bath? Personalised Baby Bath Gown Embroidered that’s attractive, fabulous and personalised is a warm welcome gift for the new born to the world. Featuring an embroidery text and a baby name, this bath gown is available in beautiful hues. Made of 100% polyester with terry toweling which is perfect to keep little bodies warm out of the bath or pool, this gorgeous gown makes a thoughtful keepsake gift. The gown feels wonderfully cosy against your baby's skin and will keep them warm whilst they dry off after a bath. ? You Child Will Love This Unique Gift Embroidered In Their Name? This is always a favourite Christmas present or a new baby gift. Our personalised towel gown is super absorbent and made of soft polyester that's also quick drying. This bath gown is fantastic for wrapping up your little baby at bath time, keeping them warm from top to toe. Super snuggly and fluffy, this comfortable white bath gown is super soft against babies’ skin. Designed to fit babies up to 24 months old comfortably, this soft cotton polyester blended bath gown includes a hood with 3D detailing and machine embroidered name to the front.
